subject: A slender green-skinned Namekian figure in a white and purple-caped garment stands in a calm, observing pose, one hand raised
suspected_ip: Kami (Dragon Ball Z — Guardian of Earth)
description: A slender green-skinned humanoid figure with Namekian cranial ridges stands facing slightly to one side. The figure wears layered robes — a white inner garment and what appears to be a purple or dark outer cloak or cape. One hand is raised in a gesture, perhaps extended toward the viewer or in a beckoning/conferring motion. A staff-like object is visible near the figure. The background is rendered in soft muted tones suggesting a sky or elevated setting. The mood is calm and contemplative — no aggressive stance or combat charge. The composition is a mid-shot with the figure occupying the center.
foreground: slender green-skinned robed Namekian, one hand raised, staff nearby
emotion: calm authority, watchful — raised hand suggests communication or blessing
